name: player_season_projected_points range year_offset sums the offset window in-query (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct 2024 (py 250, tdp 2 -> 18.00) and 2025 (py 300 -> 12.00) projections_index rows, then run player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. Projected points are additive (no range_offset_aggregate override), so the correlated subquery SUMs the per-year in-query draftkings score over the offset-expanded window (18.00 + 12.00 = 30.00), proving it re-scans projections_index scoped to the right years and discriminators and computes points in-query.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(ROUND((COALESCE(projections_index.pa, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.pc, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.py, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(projections_index.ints, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.tdp, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.ra, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.ry, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.tdr, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.fuml, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.trg, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.rec, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.recy, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.tdrec, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.twoptc, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.prtd, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.krtd, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.xpm, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg19, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg29, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg39, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg49, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg50, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(projections_index.dsk, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.dint, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.dff, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.drf, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.dtno, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.dfds, 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.dpa, 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.dya, 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE(projections_index.dblk, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.dsf, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.dtpr, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.dtd, 0) * 6), 2)) FROM projections_index WHERE projections_index.pid = player.pid AND projections_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND projections_index.sourceid = 18 AND projections_index.week = 0 AND projections_index.seas_type = 'REG') AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, py, tdp) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2024, 'REG', 250, 2)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, py, tdp) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2025, 'REG', 300, 0)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(ROUND(py * 0.04 + tdp * 4, 2)) AS season_projected_points_0 FROM projections_index WHERE pid = 'TEST-PROJ-000915' AND year IN (2024, 2025) AND sourceid = 18 AND week = 0 AND seas_type = 'REG'
